caption:
The U.S. government has granted Anthropic permission to release its advanced AI model, Mythos, to select organizations. This decision marks a significant step in the deployment of powerful AI technology under controlled conditions. 

How do you think this will impact AI development in the U.S.?

Sources: Semafor
